mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating jobless claims signal deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering recession fears that depress equity valuations and generate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous high inflation readings and aggressive federal funds rate hikes compress real disposable income and equity multiples, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns do not systematically decline when both CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS exceed their respective 75th percentiles simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and robust aggregate supply, which supports corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains negative over any 12-month rolling window during post-shock recovery periods.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts collapsing below 1 million units signals a sharp contraction in residential investment and consumer confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive when housing starts persistently decline below the 1 million threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and wage growth, which supports corporate revenues and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or forward returns in payroll growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Diverging retail sales growth and accelerating consumer price inflation indicate real income erosion and margin compression, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward returns do not systematically decline when RSAFS growth decelerates while CPIAUCSL accelerates simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 4 percent alongside persistent inflation, the real policy stance remains restrictive, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL remain elevated above historical medians for consecutive quarters.
